content: usemodule  Table of contents Prototype: usemodule(module, args) Return type: boolean Description: Execute CFEngine module script module with args , and return whether successful. The module script is expected to be located in the registered modules directory, WORKDIR/modules . Arguments: module : string - Name of module command - in the range: .* args : string - Argument string for the module - in the range: .* Example: code bundle agent test { classes : # returns $(user) "done" expression => usemodule ( "getusers" , "" ); commands : "/bin/echo" args => "test $(user) " ; } See also: read_module_protocol() , Module Protocol
